title: polygala engleri
intro: Polygala engleri, also known as Chinese Polygala, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Polygalaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Polygala engleri include reducing inflammation, improving lung function, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Polygala engleri is often combined with other herbs to create teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote respiratory health and overall well-being.
